Article: Yuko Miyamura has Health problems
[]: Yuko Miyamura has Health problems?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Dec 06, 2007 9:43 pm Hey, all. Was skimming thru my email today and I received I reply from something I said on this Youtube video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W3uyWaQOFoQ#3cjR4yCcPtA My words: Yay! I really hope Miyamura reprises her role in Rebuild. Since the other seiyuu have been, there's no reason she wouldn't. Another person's reply: i really hope so.... u know she was diagnosed with Basedow's disease in May 2007 i hope she's ok....... Apparently, this is what the disease is: http://www.wrongdiagnosis.com/medical/basedow_s_disease.htm Posting this here in case anybody knows the SAUCE of this rumor. I pray this isn't the case. It's bad enough having just found out today that a very dear RL friend of mine may have a serious health problem, a seiyuu I really like such as Miyamura having this would just upset me even more.

Article: Yuko Miyamura has Health problems
10:49 am hyperthyroidism (sp)? The contrary of the Hashimoto syndrome (hypo). If she has that, I wouldn't worry. Although it would explain lots of things, you know how thyroids handle stuff from our humour to our figure. Miyamu- deserves a slap or two, a couple levo's and back to the rice field you go. Yep, of the Eva seiyuu team, she's the on I like the less.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Dec 07, 2007 10:59 am I noticed a reference to this on Wikipedia as well last week. (I'm watching Outlaw Star at the moment). They reference this page: http://www3.bigcosmic.com/board/s/board.cgi?id=TSokcs&mode=cal&y=2007&m=5&d=12 I can tell you that the title of the article does in fact say "Basedow," but other than that I'm lost.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 08, 2007 9:29 pm What's with the Miyumura dislike? Personally, I generally like all the seiyuu from Eva, I'm just on the slightly fanatical side when it comes to Ogata and Mitsuishi. ^^; (And sometimes with Hayashibara and Tomokazu.) Also, from Leaky: Japanese voice actress Yuko Miyamura was diagnosed in 2007 after suffering exophthalmos. [1]

[]: Yuko Miyamura and Grave's Disease             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Thu Nov 04, 2010 9:00 am No one seemed to have discussed this subject until now. The following entry was from her old blog (which has been deleted and replaced by her current Ameblo blog), dated around September 2007 : バセドウ病その後の経過・・・ バセドウ病と診断され半年以上が過ぎました。 薬も一時期はすっかり飲むことを忘れていた（皆さんは真似しないでね！）のですが、 そのせいできっちり悪化もしてしまったので それからは家族の�

Article: Yuko Miyamura has Health problems
た（皆さんは真似しないでね！）のですが、 そのせいできっちり悪化もしてしまったので それからは家族の協力も得て（主にA型の夫のおかげ） 毎回かかさず、お薬を飲んで ついにこの間の検診では 血液中の数値が 基準値に戻りました！！ といっても 薬の服用は、この病気が再発しないよう2、3年は続ける必要があるので （中には10年以上も治療を続けなければならない場合もあるそうです） まだまだ飲み続けなければなりませんが・・・。 ところで 血液検査ですが 血液中の甲状腺ホルモンと抗甲状腺抗体について 測定します。 甲状腺ホルモン量の測定は→フリーサイロキシン（FT4） 　　　　　　　　　　　　　フリートリヨードサイロニン（FT3） などの血中濃度を調べます。 後は、抗甲状腺抗体→抗TSH需要体抗体（TRAb） 　　　　　　　　　　抗サイログロブリン抗体（TgAb) 　　　　　　　　　　抗甲状腺ペルオキシダーゼ抗体（TPOAb） が検出されるので、それで診断します。 次回は 私の数値の経過を 書き綴ってみようかと思います。 それではまた！！
